prompt: Out of position on a dry board, the texture is stable but your edge is not clean enough to force. Choose the best action.
why_v1: Dry boards out of position often reward control when pressure is not strong enough to justify a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The dry out-of-position read points to a call.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the stable dry texture before choosing action.
